method: 取象法 via /meihua-yishu skill (full skill invocation)

events.title_zh: 喬治亞州第14選區補選決選
events.description: Runoff between Democrat Shawn Harris (retired brigadier general) and Republican Clayton Fuller (DA, Trump-endorsed) for Marjorie Taylor Greene's former seat.

events.title_zh: 印度阿薩姆邦立法議會選舉
events.description: State assembly elections in Assam, India. BJP seeking to retain power against Congress-led opposition alliance.

events.title_zh: 諾斯洛普·格魯曼天鵝座NG-24國際太空站補給任務
events.title_en: Northrop Grumman Cygnus NG-24 ISS Resupply Launch
events.description: SpaceX Falcon 9 launches Cygnus XL cargo spacecraft to ISS with 8,200+ lbs of supplies and experiments.
Presidential election in Djibouti. Incumbent Ismail Omar Guelleh has been in power since 1999.

events.title_zh: 英國安特里大國民障礙賽
events.description: The world's most famous steeplechase horse race at Aintree Racecourse, Liverpool, England. Known for its extreme difficulty and unpredictability.
Presidential election in Benin, West Africa. Test of democratic governance amid regional instability.
The NBA Play-In Tournament determines the final playoff seeds (7-10) in each conference. High-stakes single-elimination games.

events.title_en: Michael (MJ Biopic) Opening Weekend Box Office
events.description: Opening weekend of the Michael Jackson biographical film starring Jaafar Jackson. Major cultural event given MJ's legacy and controversies.
First round of the 2026 NBA Playoffs. Oklahoma City Thunder clinched first playoff spot. Best-of-7 series across East and West conferences.

events.title_en: NHL Stanley Cup Playoffs 2026 First Round
events.description: First round of the NHL Stanley Cup Playoffs. Best-of-7 series determining which teams advance to the Conference Semifinals.
Adobe's annual digital experience conference in Las Vegas. Expected AI-powered creative tool announcements and enterprise marketing innovations.
The 130th running of the world's oldest annual marathon. Elite field competing on the iconic Boston course.
Google's annual cloud computing conference in Las Vegas. Major AI, cloud infrastructure, and developer tool announcements expected.
First round of the NFL Draft in Pittsburgh, PA. Teams select college football's top prospects. Drama around trades, surprises, and #1 overall pick.

events.title_zh: 雪佛龍錦標賽女子高爾夫大賽
events.description: First women's golf major of 2026 at The Woodlands, Texas. Top female golfers competing for the championship.
The TCS London Marathon, one of the six World Marathon Majors. Elite competition and mass participation event.
Sequel to the 2006 hit with Anne Hathaway and Meryl Streep returning. Directed by David Frankel. High anticipation for nostalgia-driven sequel.
The 152nd Kentucky Derby at Churchill Downs. 'The Most Exciting Two Minutes in Sports.' First leg of the Triple Crown.
Formula 1 returns to Miami after a gap caused by cancelled Middle East races. First F1 race since March 29 Japanese GP. New regulation cars in warm weather.

events.title_zh: 2026 Met Gala 紐約大都會藝術博物館慈善晚宴
events.description: Annual fundraising gala for the Metropolitan Museum of Art's Costume Institute. Fashion's biggest night with celebrity red carpet and themed costumes.
Local government elections across England. Key test of Labour government's popularity and Conservative recovery efforts.
Sequel to the 2021 video game adaptation. Starring Karl Urban, Hiroyuki Sanada. Action/martial arts franchise film.
The final of English football's oldest cup competition at Wembley Stadium, London.
Parliamentary elections in Cape Verde, a stable democracy in West Africa. Test of the ruling party's mandate.

events.title_zh: 法國網球公開賽開幕週
events.title_en: French Open Roland Garros 2026 Opening Week
events.description: The second Grand Slam tennis tournament of the year begins in Paris. Clay court specialists and major upsets expected.

events.title_zh: Google I/O 2026 開發者大會主題演講
events.description: Google's annual developer conference. Expected major AI/Gemini announcements, Android updates, and new product reveals.
Dell's flagship IT conference in Las Vegas. AI, hybrid cloud, data management, and enterprise security focus.
First launch of V3 Starship (Ship 39 + Booster 19). Raptor 3 engines with nearly double thrust. 43 metric tons lighter than V2.

events.title_zh: 哥倫比亞總統選舉第一輪
events.description: First round of Colombia's presidential election following the March parliamentary elections. Post-Petro era political realignment.
The Champions League Final at Puskas Arena, Budapest, Hungary. European club football's ultimate prize.
